notes: Profile deletion now syncs. Deleting a profile on one device removes it on your other devices too (per-profile tombstones + last-writer-wins in the sync manifest), instead of being silently re-added by the other device. The orphaned cloud copy is cleaned up. Guards: never removes the last profile on a device, and won't delete one you just created locally. Completes the v1.10.61-64 sync rework.
